message:
fix: sync contributor level colors with docs site and remove stale KubeCraft entries (#5241, #5243, #5244) (#5248)

- Update Captain (yellow->orange), Admiral (orange->red), and Legend
  colors to match the docs site leaderboard page
- Add red color to ContributorLadder progress bar mapping
- Remove deleted KubeCraft entry from INVENTORY.md (file no longer exists)
- Remove kube_craft and kube_craft_3d from docs/INVENTORY.md and
  renumber subsequent entries

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
